opinion.h: LUDWIG v. AMERICAN GREETINGS CORP., 366 U.S. 269 (1961)
LUDWIG v. AMERICAN GREETINGS CORP. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SIXTH CIRCUIT. No. 811. Decided May 15, 1961.
opinion.p: Ian Bruce Hart and Harry N. Kandel for appellant.
Robert W. Poore and James T. Lynn for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
opinion.h: ALATEX CONSTRUCTION SERVICE, INC. v. CRAWFORD, 366 U.S. 269 (1961)
opinion.p: 366 U.S. 269 ALATEX CONSTRUCTION SERVICE, INC., ET AL. v. CRAWFORD. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEAL OF LOUISIANA, FOURTH CIRCUIT. No. 825. Decided May 15, 1961.
Howard W. Lenfant for Community Finance Service, Inc., appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
